report.title: 资源型客户经理业绩查询

col.label: 存量客户考核基期日均
存量客户月日均新增额

select.value: Select smy.EMP_ID , smy.EMP_NM , smy.CCY_ID , smy.CL_KHJQ_AVG_BAL , smy.CL_MTH_AVG_BAL , smy.XZ_MTH_AVG_BAL , smy.M_PROFIT ,(smy.CL_MTH_AVG_BAL-smy.CL_KHJQ_AVG_BAL) as CL_MTH_AVG_ADD ,rm.ORG_ID ,rm.ORG_NM ,rm.BRANCH_ORG_ID ,rm.BRANCH_ORG_NM ,rm.POSITION_NM ,rm.PSTN_TYPE ,rm.PSTN_TYPE_NM ,rm.SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,rm.SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,(rm.KHJQ_ST_DT ||'至' ||rm.KHJQ_ED_DT) as KHJQ ,(rm.KHQ_ST_DT ||'至' || rm.KHQ_ED_DT) as KHQ ,smy.MEASURE_DT ,rm.KHQ_ST_DT ,rm.KHQ_ED_DT from IBS.T3_RESOURCE_MANAGER_EMP_SMY smy left join IBS.T5_EMP_RESOURCE_MANAGER rm on smy.EMP_ID=rm.EMP_ID and smy.KHQ_ST_DT=rm.KHQ_ST_DT and smy.KHQ_ED_DT=rm.KHQ_ED_DT WHERE {#condition#} ORDER BY EMP_ID

option.source: @{Select DISTINCT EMP_ID, EMP_NM from IBS.T5_EMP WHERE {#matchcondition#}}
@{Select DISTINCT EMP_ID, EMP_NM from IBS.T5_EMP WHERE {#matchcondition#}}
@{Select distinct PSTN_TYPE , PSTN_TYPE_NM from PUB.PERSONNEL group by PSTN_TYPE, PSTN_TYPE_NM , SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM order by PSTN_TYPE }
option.label: PSTN_TYPE_NM

option.source: @{Select distinct SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM from PUB.PERSONNEL where PSTN_TYPE='#PSTN_TYPE#' group by PSTN_TYPE, PSTN_TYPE_NM , SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM order by SUB_PSTN_TYPE }
option.label: SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT BRANCH_ORG_ID , CASE WHEN ORG_LEVEL_ID='2' THEN BRANCH_ORG_NM ELSE BRANCH_ORG_NM||'机关' END AS BRANCH_ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('2','3') ORDER BY BRANCH_ORG_ID}
option.label: BRANCH_ORG_NM

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT ORG_ID, ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE BRANCH_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID1#' and ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('1','2') ORDER BY ORG_ID}
option.label: ORG_NM

report.footer: 提示:点击员工姓名,可以查询其“资源型客户经理业绩明细”功能页面

report.title: 资源型客户经理业务查询

col.label: 存量客户考核基期日均
存量客户月日均新增额

select.value: Select smy.EMP_ID , smy.EMP_NM , smy.CCY_ID , smy.CL_KHJQ_AVG_BAL , smy.CL_MTH_AVG_BAL , smy.XZ_MTH_AVG_BAL , smy.M_PROFIT ,(smy.CL_MTH_AVG_BAL-smy.CL_KHJQ_AVG_BAL) as CL_MTH_AVG_ADD ,rm.ORG_ID ,rm.ORG_NM ,rm.BRANCH_ORG_ID ,rm.BRANCH_ORG_NM ,rm.POSITION_NM ,rm.PSTN_TYPE ,rm.PSTN_TYPE_NM ,rm.SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,rm.SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,(rm.KHJQ_ST_DT ||'至' ||rm.KHJQ_ED_DT) as KHJQ ,(rm.KHQ_ST_DT ||'至' || rm.KHQ_ED_DT) as KHQ ,smy.MEASURE_DT ,rm.KHQ_ST_DT ,rm.KHQ_ED_DT from IBS.T3_RESOURCE_MANAGER_EMP_SMY smy left join IBS.T5_EMP_RESOURCE_MANAGER rm on smy.EMP_ID=rm.EMP_ID and smy.KHQ_ST_DT=rm.KHQ_ST_DT and smy.KHQ_ED_DT=rm.KHQ_ED_DT WHERE {#condition#} ORDER BY EMP_ID

option.source: @{Select DISTINCT EMP_ID, EMP_NM from IBS.T5_EMP WHERE {#matchcondition#}}
@{Select DISTINCT EMP_ID, EMP_NM from IBS.T5_EMP WHERE {#matchcondition#}}
@{Select distinct PSTN_TYPE , PSTN_TYPE_NM from PUB.PERSONNEL group by PSTN_TYPE, PSTN_TYPE_NM , SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM order by PSTN_TYPE }
option.label: PSTN_TYPE_NM

option.source: @{Select distinct SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM from PUB.PERSONNEL where PSTN_TYPE='#PSTN_TYPE#' group by PSTN_TYPE, PSTN_TYPE_NM , SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM order by SUB_PSTN_TYPE }
option.label: SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT ORG_ID, ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE BRANCH_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID1#' and ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('1','2') ORDER BY ORG_ID}
option.label: ORG_NM

report.footer: 提示:点击员工姓名,可以查询其“资源型客户经理业绩明细”功能页面

report.title: 资源型客户经理业绩查询

col.label: 存量客户考核基期日均
存量客户月日均新增额

select.value: Select smy.EMP_ID , smy.EMP_NM , smy.CCY_ID , smy.CL_KHJQ_AVG_BAL , smy.CL_MTH_AVG_BAL , smy.XZ_MTH_AVG_BAL , smy.M_PROFIT ,(smy.CL_MTH_AVG_BAL-smy.CL_KHJQ_AVG_BAL) as CL_MTH_AVG_ADD ,rm.ORG_ID ,rm.ORG_NM ,rm.BRANCH_ORG_ID ,rm.BRANCH_ORG_NM ,rm.POSITION_NM ,rm.PSTN_TYPE ,rm.PSTN_TYPE_NM ,rm.SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,rm.SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,(rm.KHJQ_ST_DT ||'至' ||rm.KHJQ_ED_DT) as KHJQ ,(rm.KHQ_ST_DT ||'至' || rm.KHQ_ED_DT) as KHQ ,smy.MEASURE_DT ,rm.KHQ_ST_DT ,rm.KHQ_ED_DT from IBS.T3_RESOURCE_MANAGER_EMP_SMY smy left join IBS.T5_EMP_RESOURCE_MANAGER rm on smy.EMP_ID=rm.EMP_ID and smy.KHQ_ST_DT=rm.KHQ_ST_DT and smy.KHQ_ED_DT=rm.KHQ_ED_DT WHERE {#condition#} ORDER BY EMP_ID

option.source: @{Select DISTINCT EMP_ID, EMP_NM from IBS.T5_EMP WHERE {#matchcondition#}}
@{Select DISTINCT EMP_ID, EMP_NM from IBS.T5_EMP WHERE {#matchcondition#}}
@{Select distinct PSTN_TYPE , PSTN_TYPE_NM from PUB.PERSONNEL group by PSTN_TYPE, PSTN_TYPE_NM , SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM order by PSTN_TYPE }
option.label: PSTN_TYPE_NM

option.source: @{Select distinct SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM from PUB.PERSONNEL where PSTN_TYPE='#PSTN_TYPE#' group by PSTN_TYPE, PSTN_TYPE_NM , SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM order by SUB_PSTN_TYPE }
option.label: SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM

report.footer: 提示:点击员工姓名,可以查询其“资源型客户经理业绩明细”功能页面

col.label: 存量客户考核基期日均
存量客户月日均新增额

select.value: Select smy.EMP_ID , smy.EMP_NM , smy.CCY_ID , smy.CL_KHJQ_AVG_BAL , smy.CL_MTH_AVG_BAL , smy.XZ_MTH_AVG_BAL , smy.M_PROFIT ,(smy.CL_MTH_AVG_BAL-smy.CL_KHJQ_AVG_BAL) as CL_MTH_AVG_ADD ,rm.ORG_ID ,rm.ORG_NM ,rm.BRANCH_ORG_ID ,rm.BRANCH_ORG_NM ,rm.POSITION_NM ,rm.PSTN_TYPE ,rm.PSTN_TYPE_NM ,rm.SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,rm.SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,(rm.KHJQ_ST_DT ||'至' ||rm.KHJQ_ED_DT) as KHJQ ,(rm.KHQ_ST_DT ||'至' || rm.KHQ_ED_DT) as KHQ ,smy.MEASURE_DT ,rm.KHQ_ST_DT ,rm.KHQ_ED_DT from IBS.T3_RESOURCE_MANAGER_EMP_SMY smy left join IBS.T5_EMP_RESOURCE_MANAGER rm on smy.EMP_ID=rm.EMP_ID and smy.KHQ_ST_DT=rm.KHQ_ST_DT and smy.KHQ_ED_DT=rm.KHQ_ED_DT WHERE {#condition#} ORDER BY EMP_ID
